scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,web -c blue,green "npm run start -w backend" "npm run preview -w web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w web
